title: Josh's Poké Flute Pack
description:
Replaces Goat Horns with Poké Flutes. As well as re-texturing other things into keyitems from Pokemon. 

Each Poké Flute item plays a unique tune from the Pokemon series.
body:
# Josh's Poké Flute Pack

A resource pack for Cobblemon that replaces Goat Horns with Poké Flutes.
As well as retexturing elements from other mods to better fit the theme of Cobblemon.

Each Poké Flute item plays a unique tune from the Pokémon series.

Some other minecraft items have been retextured into keyitems from pokemon as well. such as the fishing rod, map, and the bundle.

A number of mods that add a camera into the game have been given an updated camera model to look like the camera from Pokémon Snap.
